description: A utility company needs regularly-spaced inspection waypoints along their line infrastructure. Load the line layer from /home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_lines.geojson (EPSG:4326) and generate points along the geometry at a distance of 0.05 degrees with no start or end offsets. Export the resulting points layer in GeoJSON format to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/inspection_points.geojson, ensuring the CRS remains EPSG:4326.
